content.en:
Hades' House.

Ye Tian gradually deepened, and the yin and evil creatures he encountered became more and more powerful, but the number was not much.

Suddenly.

A yin and evil creature whose strength was comparable to that of a genius on the other side of the Origin Lower Realm appeared, directly attacking Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian fought with him and found that the strength of this yin and evil creature was not inferior to him at all.

"I just entered here, and I encountered such a powerful Yin and Evil creature, no wonder other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors didn't dare to come here. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He had been fighting this evil creature for a long time, and he had alarmed the other, even more powerful evil creature.

It was a yin evil creature composed of countless bones, each bone was comparable to the bones of a powerhouse in the Origin Middle Realm, it was simply indestructible.

When this yin evil creature attacked, Ye Tian's Origin Rule weapon bombarded the opponent's body, and it was simply unable to break its defense, and it couldn't shake the opponent at all.

Abrupt.

One of the opponent's bone spurs directly broke through Ye Tian's other golden cover and many other defenses, penetrating his body.

After this blow, Ye Tian was hit hard.

Soon.

Ye Tian was killed by this evil creature.

......

"The evil creatures in the depths of the Hades Mansion are really terrifying!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Although he lost a replica body, he would continue to go deeper.

In the days that followed, one copy after another of Ye Tian's body went deep into the depths of the Underworld Mansion, looking for the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

Soon, he had something to gain.

Somewhere in the depths of the Hades Mansion, Ye Tian found some high-grade eternal ancient gold.

After the layers of earth were torn apart by him, he dug up some fine eternal gold.

"More than three hundred pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold, it's okay. "

Ye Tian took these high-grade eternal ancient gold, and then came out of the Hades Mansion.

After transferring these high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold to other replica bodies, they continued to enter the depths of the Hades Mansion.

In this way, as time passed, Ye Tian found more and more high-grade eternal ancient gold.

Compared to the treasure land of the ruins on the other side, there is undoubtedly more high-grade eternal ancient gold in the Hades Mansion.

Most of the high-grade eternal ancient gold in the ruins on the other side is distributed in one place after another, and it is not easy to find.

However, there are a lot of high-grade eternal ancient gold in the Hades Mansion, and if you find one place, you may find dozens or even hundreds of pieces at once.

If you're lucky, you might be able to find a vein of Eternal Ancient Gold!

this day.

Ye Tian had really discovered an eternal ancient gold vein, but it had given birth to a lot of high-grade eternal ancient gold, so it was hard to say.

However, in this Eternal Ancient Gold Vein, there are several Yin Evil Creatures stationed in it, and they are all very powerful, any Yin Evil Creature has the strength to kill him, let alone several such Yin Evil Creatures!

He infiltrated several times, was discovered, and then killed.

He even copied a very weak evil creature, only to be killed by them, and there was no way to sneak in.

After thinking about it, Ye Tian felt that there was only one way, and that was to lure these yin and evil creatures away, so that he could hope to steal those eternal ancient gold.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent four replica bodies to do this, but each replica body couldn't last a while, and there wasn't enough time.

"You have to create a defensive supreme technique to be able to stop those yin creatures!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

He was ready to create a second Beyond Supreme Technique.

With the experience of creating the first supreme technique on the other side, Ye Tian's difficulty in creating the second supreme technique was not so great.

He tried again and again, failed again and again, and accumulated experience.

Long years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created the second Beyond Supreme Technique, and it was the Beyond Shore Supreme Technique, which was mainly based on defense.

"Don't break the golden cover!"

This supreme technique of the other side is mainly defensive, based on the original rules of the other side, and with many golden scripts and black scripts on the other side as the framework, a supreme art of the other side is created.

He also tested the technique of not breaking the golden cover, and its defensive effect far exceeded that of the other side of the golden cover.

After creating such a supreme technique on the other side, Ye Tian once again sent four replica bodies to the depths of the Hades Mansion, the land of the eternal ancient gold veins.

......

Ye Tian's arrival again attracted these yin and evil creatures again.

Their intelligence was not high, and they continued to attack Ye Tian.

But this time, Ye Tian performed the Immortal Golden Cover Technique.

Airplanes!

The Immortal Golden Cover technique blocked their attacks and did not break their defenses.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian chose to run away at a speed that was neither fast nor slow, and these yin and evil creatures really chased after him.

After Ye Tian lured these yin and evil creatures away, another copy body came to this ore vein.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian quickly mined, split this vein, and took away the eternal ancient gold in it.

He didn't care about any inferior Eternal Gold, medium Eternal Gold, or Superior Eternal Gold, and whenever he sensed the existence of Eternal Gold, he would take it away.

After going out, slowly find the best Eternal Ancient Gold.

Soon, the Eternal Ancient Gold in this Eternal Ancient Gold Vein was taken away by Ye Tian, leaving only an empty Eternal Ancient Gold Vein in ruins.

After coming out of the Hades Mansion, Ye Tian's other four replica bodies had not been killed, and then he got rid of those yin and evil creatures and chose to leave.

Then.

Ye Tiancai sorted out the harvest.

"There are a lot of Eternal Ancient Gold, 1,230,000 pieces of Inferior Eternal Ancient Gold, 60,000 pieces of Medium Eternal Ancient Gold, and more than 5,800 pieces of Superior Eternal Ancient Gold. This time the harvest is very large, and at this rate, the day when I will gather 109,600 pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold is not far off. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian continued to look for the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

And because he created the supreme technique of the other side such as the Unbroken Golden Cover Technique, his life-saving ability has greatly increased, and he can also save his life when he encounters a yin evil creature that is stronger than himself.

In this way, you can find more high-quality Eternal Ancient Gold.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Ye Tian had been wandering around the Hades Mansion, and he had found more and more high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

On this day, Ye Tian calculated that his current high-grade eternal ancient gold had barely reached 109,600 yuan.

"It's okay, it's ready, and it can be used to arrange the Eternal Origin Circle!"

Ye Tian began to collect the materials for arranging the Eternal Origin Circle again.

If you don't have it on Wind Tooth Island, you can collect it in the east.

After a while, he had successfully gathered all the materials needed to set up the Eternal Origin Circle. ~
